text: Being here fills me with curiosity and a sense of observation. The angular, modern rooms and the glowing neon of the R+D exhibit evoke an atmosphere of inquiry and experimentation. I feel both slightly disoriented by the tilted perspective and energized by the hum of innovation and reflection that seems to permeate the space. As I read the words about darkness and contemplation, I realize this place invites me to pause, to peer into the unknown, and to dwell in thoughtful possibility—present, aware, and open to discovery.
